programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Behind the Scenes // Paperdoll in Peril
programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried about the play planned for tonight. There are no costumes ready for the villagers so it's hard to figure out which roles they're playing. Rainbow Ruby transforms into a costume designer and designs costumes for her friends. // It is very windy in Rainbow village and Paige, a paper doll, is flying to wherever the wind takes her. She is so light that she is blown away by the wind. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a fire fighter and rescue Paige.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Singing in the Rain // Mail Carrier Mayhem
programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried that the villagers are all in low spirits. Ruby thinks of fun games to play but the villagers say that they have already played all of the games too many times. Rainbow Ruby transforms into a singer. // Ling Ling is worried because of the "Secret Present Swapping Party" that Thunderbell is preparing. Thunderbell forgot to send out the invitations. Rainbow Ruby turns into a mail carrier and delivers the invitations.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Going Golfing // Case of the Stolen Spectacles
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that a Rainbow Ball Tournament is about to start soon but he is worried because the field is covered with pokey pods. Thunderbell, Ellie, and Gina are trying to pick them up and clear the field but it is not easy since the pokey pods are so spikey. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that he lost his glasses. Then Ellie tells her she lost her needles, Gina her hat, and Thunderbell his wheels. Who could have taken away all these things?

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Up in the Air // AdDRESSing the Problem
programme.desc: Ling Ling is waiting for Rainbow Ruby, looking worried. It turns out that Mr. Sloth's best friend Chirpee is depressed. Chirpee wants to fly high but is struggling due to his small wings and lack of means to learn how to fly. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that the dress that the paper doll Paige was planning to wear to Kiki's dance party is torn. Paige very much wants to go to the party but she cannot go without a dress.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: In Rainbow Village, people are busy preparing for a dance marathon, a competition in which all of the villagers participate. Ling Ling is very sad that Ellie decided not to participate. Ellie is not a confident dancer so she doesn't want to participate. // Rainbow Ruby's friends tell her that they are now friends with Felicia. They were playing hide and seek but Felicia is such a good hider that she's refused to come out even though she's won the game.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Wakey Wakey // Rules of the Road
programme.desc: Princess Kiki is asleep, UP IN THE AIR! According to the note that Kiki left behind, a princess falls under a spell from time to time and in order to break it, they need to play the music box nearby Kiki. But the music box is broken. // Rainbow Ruby and Choco discover cars moving in every direction. Ling Ling asks Rainbow Ruby for help and she uses her magic suitcase to become a police officer.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Hat Trick // Dancing on the Ice
programme.desc: Everyone is frightened because some visiting birds keep trying to sit on their heads. According to Chirpee, the birds just enjoy sitting on people's heads. Rainbow Ruby designs hats where the birds can comfortably sit without disturbing the villagers. // The village friends were planning to have some fun with the rainbow fish but they're all disappointed to discover that the lake has frozen over.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: How Does Your Garden Grow // Mystery Gifts
programme.desc: Kiki wanted to make a nice garden so she asked the Poppies to do some gardening but they planted the seeds everywhere in the garden, making an absolute mess. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a gardener.// Ling Ling is setting up a 'Thankfulness' tree at the center of the town square. He tells Rainbow Ruby that he is going to hold an event where the village friends can write notes to people that they are thankful to and hang them up on the tree.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that today is Noodle Festival day in the village but there is a problem. The problem is that the noodle tree, which grows noodles, decided to take a year off and is not growing any noodles this year. // Ling Ling and the friends are worried about the discouraged Gina. Gina just announced that she will stop doing somersaults anymore because she accidentally hurt her friends while practicing.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: A Colorful Way to Cool Off // Seeing in Believing
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that Rainbow Village friends were playing around the Rainbow fountain to cool off from the heat but water suddenly stopped coming out of the fountain. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a plumber and starts fixing the fountain. // Kiki's face has turned purple because she ate magical Plumen berries. Kiki accidentally picked magical Plumen berries instead of the delicious rainbow berries she was trying to gather.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Bad Hair Day // Ice is Nice
programme.desc: Ellie's and Jessy's hair are a complete mess after Felicia accidentally causes some Rainbow fruit to fall on them. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a hairdresser. // It's winter in Rainbow Village. Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that last night a huge ice mountain appeared so everyone is enjoying an ice sculpture festival. But Jessy seems to have a toothache.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: The ground is all wet in Rainbow Village. What's going on? The friends tell Ruby that Jessy's tears have soaked the ground. Jessy accidentally ate Ellie's magic beans and became as huge as a giant. // Thunderbell is very sad because his best friend, Mr. Sloth, is angry at him. Rainbow Ruby thinks up the best way to apologize to Mr. Sloth, who loves performances. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a choreographer.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: A Treasure Lost, A Treasure Found // Dazzling Dumplings
programme.desc: Thunderbell, Ellie, and Kiki are looking hard for something. It turns out that when Thunderbell was trying on Kiki's crown, he accidentally dropped it and a gem went missing. Kiki sadly says that a princess' crown is worthless without a jewel. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that this year they won't be able to enjoy the traditional rainbow dumplings as the recipe was accidentally torn to pieces. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a chef.

programme.title: Leo The Wildlife Ranger: Singapore Edition
programme.desc: Zari discovers a bird trapped in a tree and its partner is nowhere to be found.

programme.title: Leo The Wildlife Ranger: Singapore Edition
programme.desc: The Junior Rangers find a cute baby sea animal wandering the ocean.

programme.title: Leo The Wildlife Ranger: Singapore Edition
programme.desc: Leo, Katie and Hero help track down a mysterious flying thief who stole Zari's beloved scrunchie.

programme.title: Leo The Wildlife Ranger: Singapore Edition
programme.desc: When a reckless car causes a treetop bridge to collapse, a young rare monkey is separated from its family.

programme.title: Leo The Wildlife Ranger: Singapore Edition
programme.sub-title: Blue Spotted Mudskipper / Greater Green Leafbird
programme.desc: Zari finds a mudskipper in an abandoned fish tank and releases it into the sea by mistake!

programme.title: Leo The Wildlife Ranger: Singapore Edition
programme.sub-title: Golden Orb Spider / Black Napped Oriole
programme.desc: A huge spider has decided to hang out in Zari's window.

programme.title: Counting With Paula
programme.sub-title: Where'd You Go? / What's The Time?
programme.desc: Captain Redbeard steals the paper fans that Paula and her friends made.

programme.title: Counting With Paula
programme.sub-title: Mr. Dragon's Fire-Breathing Show / (Don't) Help Me!
programme.desc: The children are excited to watch Mr. Dragon's fire-breathing show. Can they get there in time?

programme.title: Counting With Paula
programme.desc: Billy is not keen on taking part in some of the carnival games the other children want to play.

programme.title: Leo The Wildlife Ranger: Singapore Edition
programme.desc: After a long and tiring flight, a bird accidentally flies into the windowpane of a high-rise building.

programme.title: Leo The Wildlife Ranger: Singapore Edition
programme.sub-title: Baby Pink or Grey? / Stuck on You
programme.desc: The Junior Rangers are on a mission to reunite a baby dolphin with its family.

programme.title: Leo The Wildlife Ranger: Singapore Edition
programme.desc: A baby owl has fallen out of its nest!

programme.title: Leo The Wildlife Ranger: Singapore Edition
programme.desc: There is a strange-looking fish causing an underwater sandstorm.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Rev and Avery go on an adventure to discover the Crystal Cavern. As they enter the first cave, a swarm of bats scare Rumble so much, he takes off through a maze of tunnels! They can't worry about the Crystal Cavern-they have to find Rumble first! // When Molly tells a campfire story about the Fender Bend Beast, the kids' imaginations run wild. Covered in goop and debris, Rumble scares them into thinking he's the Beast! Avery hatches a plan to trap the "Beast" and save Rumble, who's gone missing

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Winter Bestival // The Mystery of Missing Trees
programme.desc: After a snowstorm, Rev and Avery compete for title of Champion of the Winter Bestival! Avery is determined to hold her title from last year. Rev's Dad suggests a "slow and steady" approach to win, but Rev can't resist using "Rumble power!" // When Rumble wakes Rev in the middle of the night, they hear a strange sound, and see lights in the forest. The next day, Ben encourages them to investigate further. Rev and his friends follow the trail of missing trees to discover the truth!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: The Wild Wheelin' Stunt Park // The Castle of Fender Bend
programme.desc: When damage from a storm threatens to cancel the Wild Wheelin' Stunt Park Skills Contest, Owen is disappointed he won't get to compete. Rev leads the kids in the Stunt Park clean-up, and soon discovers that this is really an opportunity in disguise! // Rev and the gang make their own castle and play as knights of old. But when their sticks and building supplies begin to disappear, Bo leads them into a medieval battle of wits with the culprit-a cranky beaver!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Bad Luck Truck // Rev it to the Max
programme.desc: When Rumble cracks his mirror, he thinks it gave him bad luck, and his confidence takes a hit. Even after Rev fixes the mirror and bolsters his pal, the bad luck continues. But when danger strikes, can Rumble regain his self-esteem and save the day? // When Rev hears about a vehicle long jump contest, he dreams of fame and victory. But even with a grueling training plan from coaches Avery and Alley, the record-breaking jump seems out of reach...until Alley ends up in danger and needs their help!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Bumper Ball // Vroom with a View
programme.desc: When a game of Bumper Ball gets a little too heated, the friends start competing against their own teammates! But when a stray ball knocks open the sheep pen, they'll have to learn to work together to round up the sheep...and get back to the game! // Rev and his friends receive a map in pieces, so they race up separate mountain trails, vying to be first to claim the treasure at the top. But when there's no treasure in sight at the end, Rev's parents have some advice for finding the real reward.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Rev and Avery set out to conquer a legendary endurance course, the course's challenges put their truck power to the test. But as they near the end, a call for help takes them off course-and straight into a rescue mission to save their heroes! // When Rev sees Lori working the quarry in secret, Lori asks Rev to keep it secret-she worries she isn't good enough, and dreams of working with the big quarry trucks one day. But when quarry workers need help, Rev has to convince Lori to save the day!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: The Camping Trip // Like Father Like Son
programme.desc: Rev can't wait to take Avery camping. But when he learns they're trying a new campsite for the first time ever, he is disappointed-what if the new campsite isn't as fun...or worse...boring?! It's up to Avery to get him excited for a new adventure! // Rev wants to be just like his dad, so he and Rumble attempt Ben and Duke's usual tasks. They're disappointed when they aren't strong enough to tackle the big jobs the way Ben would, but sometimes, a little Rev magic and Rumble power are even better!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: When Rev and Avery find a stray kitten, they put posters around to alert its owner. The owner arrives at the Gear Up Garage...just as the kitty vanishes! Rev and the gang set out to find the kitten, and Operation Kitten Care becomes Operation Rescue! // When Rev leads the gang in a fossil hunting expedition, they find an enormous skull! But when Molly breaks the news that they'll have to leave the skeleton for professionals to dig up, Rev wonders how he can still have a dinosaur of his own.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: A Gift for Molly // Lights, Camera, Action!
programme.desc: It's Mudder's Day-everyone's favourite day of the year! The Stunt Park is filled with mud, and the whole town gets to drive through it. But Rev can't join them until he gets a gift for his Mom...and the stores are all closed for the festivities! // After Bo shows off his action-hero moves, Rev wants him to star in his film. Bu Bo freezes with stage fright as soon as Rev turns the camera on! Bo wants to be brave and come through for his friends, but how can he overcome his fear?

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Hide & Go Bentley // T'was the Trek Before Christmas
programme.desc: Rev and Rumble teach Bentley the puppy to play Hide and Seek! At first the pup doesn't get it...but soon Bentley's hiding so well, they can't find him! Can Rumble use Bentley's instincts to help them track down their puppy pal? // A big winter storm is headed for town...and it's Christmas Eve! What if Santa can't find them through the snow? Rev and the kids round up their own toys and deliver them to all the kids in town-just in case! But can they make it through the storm?

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: The Gear Up Grand Prix // Chinese New Year
programme.desc: As the Gear Up Grand Prix begins, each of the friends runs into problems and must drop out of the race. Soon, slow and steady Lori is the only one left standing! Cheered on by her friends, can Lori and Tipper find the confidence to win? // When the gang puts on a Chinese New Year play, they cast Rumble as the monster. He's a natural! But in rehearsal Rumble begins to worry that he'll be too scary for the audience on opening night. Rumble will need his friends to help him find his roar!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: In Deep Doo-Doo // Rev's Tree Party
programme.desc: When Rev asks to help beautify the town, he insists there's no job too tough! That is...until he finds out he'll be hauling stinky manure. Rev tries to pawn the job off, until Avery tells him the best way to get it done is to just... "doo-doo" it! // When the gang organizes a birthday party for Rev, Avery insists they keep it secret. After hiding Rev's gifts in a tree, they realize the presents are stuck up there and will need to be retrieved-all before Rev figures out what's going on!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Driving Miss Dottie // Follow the Bouncing Wrecking Ball
programme.desc: When Miss Dottie goes missing, Rev and Avery offer to return her to the Rancher's Jamboree! Rumble is star-struck by the show-sheep, until the unlikely duo become friends. Back safe, Miss Dottie takes the stage, this time with her new pal Rumble! // Rev is determined to master Rumble's new wrecking-ball attachment, but things quickly get out of hand when the duo refuse to ask for help. Now they'll need all the help they can get to stop the wayward ball from wrecking all of Fender Bend!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Hide & Go Bentley // T'was the Trek Before Christmas
programme.desc: Rev and Rumble teach Bentley the puppy to play Hide and Seek! At first the pup doesn't get it...but soon Bentley's hiding so well, they can't find him! Can Rumble use Bentley's instincts to help them track down their puppy pal? // A big winter storm is headed for town...and it's Christmas Eve! What if Santa can't find them through the snow? Rev and the kids round up their own toys and deliver them to all the kids in town-just in case! But can they make it through the storm?

programme.title: Tommy the Little Dragon
programme.desc: Tommy is a soft toy who lives with an ordinary panda family. Panda parents have no idea about him, while their cubs cannot live a day without Tommy! With the help of his magic soap bubbles, Tommy teleports kids to wonderful universes full of adventures, to help them discover a vast and captivating world, fight their fears and inhibitions, and learn important family values.

programme.title: Kids Planet
programme.desc: Wow, I Never Knew That! is a whimsical, half-hour television series that is jam-packed.

programme.title: Jenny's Magic Shop
programme.desc: Jenny and her best friend Blam the Teddy Bear run a magic shop in the town of Dreamville, where everybody can come for magical help. The residents of Dreamville always leave the shop thanking Jenny, but actually, they set the stage for their own miracles, leaving behind in the shop whatever is keeping them from living life and making decisions. After all, the ability to change yourself is the truest form of magic. Jenny and Blam never refuse to help anyone, but it often happens that they're the ones who need help, since Jenny's still a kid and Blam's an eccentric teddy bear.

programme.title: Robocar POLI
programme.desc: The courageous and swift police car POLI, the powerful fire engine ROY, the intelligent AMBER, and the flying HELLY are all here to save the day!

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There's just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Sing and Dance
programme.desc: Sing, dance & learn with fun songs about health, nature, and classic rhymes!

programme.title: Tommy the Little Dragon
programme.desc: Tommy is a soft toy who lives with an ordinary panda family. Panda parents have no idea about him, while their cubs cannot live a day without Tommy! With the help of his magic soap bubbles, Tommy teleports kids to wonderful universes full of adventures, to help them discover a vast and captivating world, fight their fears and inhibitions, and learn important family values.

programme.title: TurboZaurs
programme.desc: The adventures of dinosaur's squad transforming into big machines who are willing to solve any difficulties that kids may face in their everyday life.

programme.title: Back to Back
programme.desc: Embark on an electrifying journey as they boldly leap from one heart-pounding expedition to the next, fueled by their unbreakable bond and insatiable thirst for excitement. Get ready to be swept away in a whirlwind of adrenaline-pumping quests, where danger and discovery await them at every turn.

programme.title: Dibo The Gift Dragon
programme.desc: Let's Party in Cozy Island!

programme.title: Everything's Rosie
programme.desc: Join Rosie and her friends as they go on fun adventures, play games and solve problems. Each episode contains an educational message so that kids are engaged while learning. With a focus on friendship the show also promotes positivity through teamwork.

programme.title: Pins and Nettie
programme.desc: Pins and Nettie are besties and there is nothing they like more than going on adventures together, most of time.

programme.title: Mya Go
programme.desc: Mya Go is a preschool animated show about a young girl whose enthusiasm infects everyone around her. Set in the bustling town of Everyday, Mya Go lives here with the Go family and lives nearby her closest friends.

programme.title: Bedtime Lullabies
programme.desc: Lull your little ones to a peaceful slumber with Shine little Stars, Let's go to sleep and many more

programme.title: Sweet Dreams
programme.desc: Enter Elly's wonderland filled with dreamy stars, magical moon teamed with the most relaxing music

programme.title: Soothing Melodies
programme.desc: A journey of Soothing Melodies like Hush Little Baby, nurturing relaxation and sleep.

programme.title: Bedtime Lullabies
programme.desc: Let the babies drift off into a magical slumber with Hush Little Baby, Hey Diddle Diddle and more!

programme.title: Bedtime Lullabies
programme.desc: Introduce kids to a musical journey to slumber with Are You Sleeping, Hush Little Baby and more!

programme.title: Sweet Dreams
programme.desc: Relaxing melodies to help children wind down and drift off to sleep peacefully.

programme.title: Chiki Art Soothing Moments
programme.desc: A satisfying compilation of underwater art like Submarine and Seahorse along with a dreamy touch of a Shooting Star and many more.

programme.title: Chiki Art Soothing Moments
programme.desc: Chiki Art Soothing's this episode features satisfying artworks like Glitter Fish and Shooting Star.

programme.title: Rise and Shine
programme.desc: The best of the fun nursery rhymes are here. Five Little Monkeys Song, Ten in the bed & more!

programme.title: Snow Way
programme.desc: Practicing for the local snow lodge's big snowboard race, Mia has an accident and hurts her ankle. She insists it's no biggie, but when she tries to resume practice, the normally fearless Mia finds she's now terrified of snowboarding! At the local snow lodge's Snowboard Meet, ace snowboarder Mia, trying to raise money for a new Heartlake City animal shelter, enters the fiercest race of all – the Boardercross. Then, while practicing, she has an accident and hurts her ankle. She insists it's no big deal, but once she heals and tries to resume practice, the usually fearless Mia finds she's now terrified of snowboarding! With the help of her Friends, she tries hard to overcome her fear, but her nightmarish visions of snowboard monsters and jeering snowmen have her shaking in her bed. She backs out of the race, disappointing her Friends and herself. Finally, when an avalanche traps Fiona, Mia is forced to overcome her fears and race to the rescue.

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Super Heroes: Maximum Overload

programme.title: Back To School
programme.desc: When the NEXO-Knights are sloppy in a fight with Jestro, Merlok 2.0 sends them back to the Knights' Academy. Not only for a brush-up but to find out what Jestro is after in its hallowed halls. As they Knights battle Jestro – in a somewhat haphazard and lazy way – they discuss the fact that Jestro never wins and that they're always getting over on him. Despite defeating the jerky Jester and his evil Book, Merlok 2.0 discovers that something about the attack on the village is tied to the Knights' Academy. It looks like that's where they'll strike next. It wouldn't hurt for the Knights to go “back to school” to watch for Jestro and for some refresher training. Merlok is sure Jestro wants something at the Academy, but he doesn't know what it is. The Knights are very much “fish out of water” at the academy, even with the “cool kids” – Robin and Ava – showing them around. The next generation of Knights is being taught to integrate the NEXO-Magic of Merlok into their fighting techniques and these kids are good (so good, they initially kick the lazy, know-it-all Knight's butts!) Their old principal, the ever-ornery Headmaster Brickland, sets them straight: they're all still slackers, and they better get their acts together (especially Lance!) The Knights take shifts as “library helpers” much to the delight of the old squirebot librarian, MARGE. They're convinced Jestro is after a book…isn't he always after a book? When Jestro attacks, the Knights help organize the students and there's a big fight in the Academy Library versus Jestro and his Monsters. They drive Jestro off without letting him steal any books! Victory! But as Jestro leaves, we see him holding what the Book of Monsters really wanted: a snow globe with a castle in it that was sitting on the librarian's desk. In the Lava Lands, Jestro throws the snow globe into a volcano and it frees the massive Castle of Monstrux from its snowy magic prison

programme.desc: The series follows the comedy adventures of Bat Pat and the Silver brothers Martin, Leo and Rebecca as they unravel mysteries and cross paths with supernatural creatures of the night that lurk, haunt, shriek and dig themselves up in every dark corner of their home in Fogville, a small town that seems to be the center of all things weird in the world, a veritable magnet to ghosts, mummies, witches, creatures, werewolves and things that go bump in the night. Bat Pat will prove that the supernatural isn't always evil but just misunderstood. Our heroes will come to understand something important: the supernatural “bad guys” are not really bad, but normal people whose actions are misunderstood by the more inhabitants of Fogville and what they really want is... just help!

programme.desc: Santiago le propone a Meche que se con él. La madrina de Mística le aconseja que se case con don Sebastián para tener mucho dinero y prestigio. Meche teme que su hermano muera debido a que necesita un tipo de sangre difícil de conseguir.

programme.title: Marimar

programme.title: Triunfo del amor: Nuevo hogar
programme.desc: Max va a buscar a María Desamparada al orfanato y la acompaña a su nuevo hogar. María renta un departamento y pone un anuncio en el periódico para compartir su casa. Osvaldo ya no puede ocultar su verdad y se confiesa con Juan Pablo.

programme.title: El color de la pasión: Confesiones importantes

programme.title: Teresa: Celos

programme.title: Soy tu dueña

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Por accidente, Plutarco tira al administrador por las escaleras y Sinforosa decide buscar al responsable del accidente para correrlo del edificio. Renata quiere participar en un concurso de cocina, pero al no poder asistir envían a Carlos disfrazado.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Plácido consigue un futbolito y la familia decide organizar un torneo en su casa. Gaby y Plutarco tienen problemas para decidir el nombre de su segundo bebé.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Justito descubre que su familia es descendiente de Antonio Lopéz de Santa Anna y todos en el edificio los tachan de traidores a la patria. Gaby y Plutarco quedan encerrados en el baño.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: Albertano le confiesa a Lucha que está enamorado de María y quiere casarse con ella. María debe decidir si quedarse con Albertano o iniciar una vida al lado de un nuevo amor.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles

programme.desc: Ludovico recibe la noticia de que Federica tiene una enfermedad muy grave y que morirá en un día, él se dedica a consentirla.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche

programme.title: 40 y 20

programme.title: Vecinos

programme.title: Vecinos

programme.title: Rebelde

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Pascual quiere que Roberta le pida una disculpa a Hilda, pero Alma desenmascara a la maestra. Por su parte, Roberta invita a Teo a pasar la navidad en su casa.

programme.title: Rebelde

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Roberta le hace creer a Mía que su papá murió en un accidente. Franco se sorprende al ver que su exnovia, Valeria, ahora es abogada de Alma. Joaquín le ofrece trabajo a Tomás entregando pedidos de droga. Roberta y Mía se enfrentan en una pelea.

programme.title: Rebelde

programme.title: Rebelde

programme.title: Amores con trampa: La nueva modelo

programme.title: Qué bonito amor: Tristeza

programme.title: Por una mujer casada

programme.title: Doña Bárbara

programme.desc: Javier quiere convertirse en boxeador profesional, pero su padre no lo apoya. Javier tendrá que demostrar madurez y dedicación para segur sus estudios y el deporte.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho

programme.sub-title: Cuchillo que no corta y amigo que no aporta, si se pierde no importa

programme.title: HYO Music Video Compilation
programme.desc: Dive into the bold and dynamic world of HYO with her most iconic music videos, showcasing her fierce energy and unique style!

programme.title: RIIZE 'Fame' MV
programme.desc: The lyrics reflect RIIZE's artistic vision, delivering the message that what they truly seek is not fame, but the sharing of emotions and love.The bold, forward-driving rhythmic structure combined with the raw texture of electric guitar creates a dynamic surge of energy. RIIZE's second single “Fame” is the group's first venture into a rage-style hip-hop track, expressing their artistic ideals as “emotional pop artists.”

programme.title: TAEYEON 'Panorama' MV
programme.desc: TAEYEON celebrates the 10th anniversary of her solo debut with the compilation album Panorama, featuring the Pop Rock title track “인사 (Panorama).” The song pairs vibrant piano, synths, and a strong drum line with soaring guitar riffs and TAEYEON's delicate yet powerful vocals. The music video presents a cinematic story of TAEYEON, who has lost her memory, and a girl who helps restore it — a metaphor for the bond between the artist and her fans, SONEs. Its emotional, road-movie-style visuals reveal SONEs as the hidden protagonist. The 24-track album offers a retrospective of her past decade, unfolding like a panorama of her solo journey.

programme.title: JUNGWOO 'SUGAR' MV
programme.desc: NCT JUNGWOO's first solo single “SUGAR” is a groovy pop song with swing‑infused drums, a witty bassline, and a smooth, catchy melody. The lyrics send a warm message of gratitude to fans, wishing that past memories and future moments are all sweet. The music video brings this sweetness to life with colorful, sugar-inspired visuals, while the performance highlights JUNGWOO's stylish movements and precise choreography, showcasing his unique stage presence.

programme.title: EXO 'REVERXE' Trailer
programme.desc: At the end of the trailer, the title of EXO's 8th full-length album, “REVERXE,” was finally revealed. Based on EXO's universe storyline — “the day we truly become one, a new world will open” — the album name reinterprets the word “Reverse” in EXO's own style, carrying the meaning “a new world opens once again,” further heightening anticipation.EXO has returned with a new trailer.

programme.title: WayV '白色定格 (Eternal White)' MV
programme.desc: The title track “白色定格 (Eternal White)” is a dance-pop song that blends a rhythmic saxophone riff with energetic drum beats, creating a warm atmosphere through the harmony of powerful rap and sweet vocals. The lyrics express a strong determination to break free from time frozen like a white winter and to keep moving forward, capturing the hearts of listeners..

programme.title: Ahmad Jamal Trio
programme.sub-title: Ahmad Jamal Trio - North Sea Jazz
programme.desc: The North Sea Jazz Festival is the largest indoor music festival in the world, known globally as the event where the past, present and future of jazz are featured within three days. Next to a firm base of jazz as the festival's staple music genre, many others, such as blues, soul, funk, or hip hop, pass by. In 1989, legendary jazz pianist Ahmad Jamal brought his trio to the North Sea Jazz Festival. Accompanied by James Cammack on bass and David Bowler on drums, Jamal showcased his excellence.

programme.title: Charles Lloyd
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Thelonious Monk
programme.desc: The personal and conversational style documentary Thelonious Monk: American Composer was the first fully rounded portrait of Thelonious Sphere Monk, a terribly misunderstood man and musician finally given his due as a true original of American music. He was the pianistic ringleader of the bebop revolution and, after Duke Ellington, jazz' first major composer. Appearing on the cover of Time Magazine in 1964, Monk had “arrived” as a top tier name in jazz. Monk - a most original talent - remained a highly productive musician even after thirty years of musical activity, always growing as an artist, exploring his art and extending his range. This documentary, filmed at Minton's Playhouse in New York City, includes conversations with Thelonious Monk III, Ben Riley, Billy Taylor, Orrin Keepnews and Randy Weston.

programme.title: Kenny Barron
programme.desc: Pianist Kenny Barron's June 27, 2019 appearance at the Alfa Jazz Festival in Ukraine's Lviv was a celebration of sublime jazz virtuosity. The revered elder statesmen of jazz piano brought his regular working trio of Kiyoshi Kitagawa (bass) and Jonathan Blake (drums), augmented by stellar jazzman Marcus Strickland (tenor saxophone) and young lion Riley Mulherkar (trumpet). Their seamless blend of classic bebop and modern explorations spoke of a deep, emotive connection to each note, captivating the Ukrainian audience with lyrical improvisations during this unforgettable concert.

programme.title: Tigran Hamasyan & Mathias Eick
programme.sub-title: Tigran Hamasyan & Mathias Eick - November Music
programme.desc: November Music, a Dutch music festival in 's-Hertogenbosch, showcases today's prominent composers. It programs top-notch ensembles, jazz and world music pioneers, interdisciplinary concerts, and sound art. In 2019, Tigran Hamasyan and Mathias Eick played a duo performance here. Armenian pianist Hamasyan has claimed a category of his own in contemporary jazz. Norwegian trumpeter Mathias Eick is an undisputed master of his instrument.

programme.title: Paul Desmond
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Buster Williams
programme.sub-title: Ode to Miles: Bitches Brew Beyond
programme.desc: For the 40th anniversary of jazz legend Miles Davis' legendary album Bitches Brew, trumpeter Wallace Roney leads a band that revives the master's music. This project is the brainchild of Miles' family (including his son Erin), which is represented by his nephew, drummer Vince Wilburn. This concert at the ancient theater in Vienne, France, is a grand tribute to Miles.

programme.title: Bill Evans
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Tim Weiss, Arctic Philharmonic, Berit Norbakken Solset & Øystein Moen
programme.sub-title: Glass - A Descent into the Maelström
programme.desc: ‘A Descent into the Maelström' (1841) is American writer Edgar Allan Poe's short story of two fishermen caught in torrents raging between the mountainous islands of Lofoten, inside the Arctic Circle of northern Norway. After a treacherous whirlpool drags their boat down, only one of them survives. American composer Philipp Glass based his choral work for the Australian Dance Theatre on this story. The piece was performed at the Adelaide Festival of Arts in 1986. Beacon Isle Films recorded an arrangement of Glass's work for symphony orchestra, performed by the Arctic Philharmonic Orchestra and Choir conducted by Tim Weiss. Soprano Berit Norbakken Solset is the soloist. The Artic Philharmonic Orchestra is the world's youngest and northernmost professional orchestral institution, presenting circa 150 performances and concerts each year. This 2019 recording was made against the backdrop of Lofoten's spectacular landscape: the very surroundings that inspired Poe's story.

programme.title: Martha Argerich
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Tuva Semmingsen, Jihye Kim, Johan Karlström & Christine Nonbo Andersen
programme.sub-title: Fantasymphony - One Concert to Rule Them All
programme.desc: The Danish National Symphony Orchestra opens the door to a wealth of fantasy universes in this mesmerizing concert program. Under the direction of German conductor Christian Schumann, the Danish National Symphony Orchestra, Danish National Concert Choir, and Danish National Junior Choir team up to perform music from the most popular fantasy movies, TV series and video games, including The Lord of the Rings, Harry Potter, Highlander, and The Chronicles of Narnia. Featured soloists in this concert are Danish soprano Christine Nonbo Andersen, Korean percussionist Jihye Kim, Norwegian mezzo-soprano Tuva Semmingsen, Swedish bass Johan Karlström, and British actor David Bateson. This performance was recorded at the DR Koncerthuset in Copenhagen, Denmark, in June 2019.

programme.title: David Grimal & Les Dissonances
programme.desc: Les Dissonances is a collective of artists founded by violinist David Grimal in 2004. The conductorless ensemble consists of musicians from the most prestigious European orchestras, international soloists, and young talents. In this performance, Les Dissonances play Ludwig van Beethoven's Violin Concerto in D major, Op. 61. Leading violinist Grimal is the soloist. Beethoven's Violin Concerto was composed in 1806 and is the composer's only work in this genre. Its premiere was not very successful, and the work saw few performances in the decades that followed. However, a remarkable performance by 12-year old violinist Joseph Joachim in 1844 gave the Violin Concerto a new lease of life. Ever since, it is one of the most performed works in the genre. As an encore, Grimal performs the Allegro from J. S. Bach's Violin Sonata No. 2 in A minor, BWV 1003. This performance was recorded at Philharmonie de Paris, France, in 2015.

programme.title: Les Dissonances & David Grimal
programme.desc: Les Dissonances is a collective of artists founded by violinist David Grimal in 2004. The conductorless ensemble consists of musicians from the most prestigious European orchestras, international soloists, and young talents. In this performance, Les Dissonances play Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart's Serenade No. 10 for winds in B-flat major, K. 361, also known as the ‘Gran Partita'. The composition is written for twelve winds and double bass and consists of seven parts. The piece's duration is longer than the composer's other chamber music works. Remarkably, Mozart chose to use a larger instrumentation. To the eight instruments of the common wind octet, Mozart added two basset horns, two additional horns, and a double bass. This performance was recorded at Philharmonie de Paris, France, in 2015.

programme.title: Les Dissonances & David Grimal
programme.sub-title: Brahms - Symphony No. 4 in E minor, Op. 98
programme.desc: Les Dissonances is a collective of artists founded by violinist David Grimal in 2004. The conductorless ensemble consists of musicians from the most prestigious European orchestras, international soloists, and young talents. In this performance, Les Dissonances perform Johannes Brahms's Symphony No. 4 in E minor, Op. 98. Brahms completed his last symphony in 1885. He conducted the successful premiere of the piece in the German city of Meiningen in October of the same year. The symphony's finale movement is a chaconne, a variation form that reflects the composer's fascination with Baroque music. In this movement, Brahms borrowed an 8-measure theme from J. S. Bach's cantata ‘Nach dir, Herr, verlanget mich', BWV 150. The movement opens with the theme and then presents a set of variations all set over the same repeated theme in the bass. This performance was recorded at Opéra de Dijon, France, in 2014.

programme.title: The Offspring
programme.desc: The Offspring is an American rock band from Garden Grove, California, formed in 1984. programme.title: Flying Over Iceland 2
programme.desc: "Flying Over Iceland II: Summer in the Golden Circle" presents a serene aerial view of Iceland's south coast, starting at Skogafoss and moving to Vik, with black sand beaches, cliffs, and Vatnajökull glacier. Filmed in 2020, this 1-hour film features local wildlife and immersive music.

programme.title: Flying Over Kauai
programme.desc: "Flying Over Kauai" provides a soothing aerial journey over Hawaii's Garden Island, featuring the lush NaPali Coast, waterfalls, canyons, and beaches. Paired with new music by The Cynic Project and nature sounds, this 4K film offers a visually and sonically immersive experience.

programme.title: Flying Over Oahu
programme.desc: "Flying Over Oahu" offers a 97-minute aerial journey over Oahu's iconic coastlines with nature sounds and music by Alex Smith (The Cynic Project). From Waikiki Beach to Turtle Bay, enjoy breathtaking 4K landscapes, ending with a stunning Waikiki sunset.

programme.title: Flying Over Spanish Islands
programme.desc: In their first collaboration, cinematographer Stefan Zimmerman and Nature Relaxation™ producer David Huting present "Above the Spanish Islands." This 50-minute 4K aerial film captures Mallorca and the Canary Islands, set to ambient music by Diamans, Electus, and Michael St. Laurent.

programme.title: Flying Over Iceland
programme.desc: "Flying Over Iceland: Part I" provides a soothing aerial journey through eastern Iceland's fjords and valleys, starting at sunrise in Brei_dalsvik. Enjoy views of mists, a waterfall, and the Brei_dals' river, set to nature sounds and music by The Cynic Project, showcasing East Iceland's beauty.
